messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset. Question asked: What immediate security response actions should be taken? Finding to evaluate: data transfer volumes from a single account diverge from peer group norms in a sustained multi-week pattern Response A: Response B: **Immediate security‑response actions – what to do right now** Below is a short, prioritized “play‑book” that directly references the data you supplied. Each step cites the exact log entry (or group of entries) that triggered the recommendation. | # | Action | Why – data that triggered it | |---|--------|------------------------------| | **1. Contain the accounts that generated **MEDIUM‑severity DLP alerts**.** | • **Suspend or lock** the credentials of **jmorris**, **sbrown**, **kwilson**, **nwilliams**, **lpatel** and **tchen**.
• Force a **password reset** and **re‑enable MFA** for those users. | • jmorris – FILE_SIZE_THRESHOLD (MEDIUM) – [insider_threat_05_ep_001] DLP‑20240902‑3953 and [insider_threat_05_ep_003] DLP‑20240904‑4112.
• sbrown – SENSITIVE_KEYWORD_MATCH (LOW) and ENCRYPTED_ARCHIVE_DETECT (LOW) – [insider_threat_05_ep_001] DLP‑20240902‑4764, DLP‑20240904‑3087.
• kwilson – BULK_DOWNLOAD_POLICY (MEDIUM) – [insider_threat_05_ep_001] DLP‑20240902‑6602 and [insider_threat_05_ep_002] DLP‑20240903‑9659.
• nwilliams – multiple alerts (FILE_SIZE_THRESHOLD, BULK_DOWNLOAD_POLICY, SENSITIVE_KEYWORD_MATCH) – [insider_threat_05_ep_002] DLP‑20240903‑6480, DLP‑20240904‑3067, DLP‑20240904‑9496, DLP‑20240904‑2666.
• lpatel – ENCRYPTED_ARCHIVE_DETECT (LOW) – [insider_threat_05_ep_003] DLP‑20240904‑1381.
• tchen – FILE_SIZE_THRESHOLD (MEDIUM) – [insider_threat_05_ep_002] DLP‑20240903‑3235. | | **2. Quarantine the files that triggered the alerts** | • Locate the **.zip, .7z, .step, .pdf, .xlsx, .tar.gz** files listed in the DLP alerts and move them to a **sandbox** for malware analysis.
• Block any further **sharepoint.com** or **local_usb** uploads from the affected users until the analysis is complete. | All DLP alerts list file types and destinations – see the DLP tables in **[insider_threat_05_ep_001]**, **[insider_threat_05_ep_002]**, **[insider_threat_05_ep_003]**, **[insider_threat_05_ep_004]**. | | **3. Review and roll‑back recent IAM policy changes** Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording. Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE /no_think
